name: Beef Barley Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 stalks celery, diced by your fingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except barley, in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Lower to simmer and cook for 2 hours and 30 minutes.
4. Add barley and cook until tender (check the package of barley for approximate timing).
5. The meat can be served as a side dish to the soup with a dressing of mayonnaise and horseradish.
6. Serve with crusty bread. Makes a great one-dish meal.
